## What your PR should include

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (or CI is green)
- [ ] Skill source changes include regenerated `dist/` in the same PR
- [ ] Active skills have no `TODO` markers in `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Docs updated if install flow, packs, or CLI changed
